text: Change your Team plan from monthly to annual billing | Claude Help Center Change your Team plan from monthly to annual billing Owners and Primary Owners of Team plans with monthly subscriptions can switch from the monthly plan to an annual plan by following these steps: Navigate to Organization settings > Billing or claude.ai/upgrade . Navigate to Organization settings > Billing or claude.ai/upgrade . You’ll see a banner confirming your current monthly plan in your Billing settings; click the “Switch to Annual” button. You’ll see a banner confirming your current monthly plan in your Billing settings; click the “Switch to Annual” button. Or from /upgrade, click the “Switch to Annual plan” button: Or from /upgrade, click the “Switch to Annual plan” button: The confirmation screen will display the total cost for your upgrade from monthly to annual billing: The confirmation screen will display the total cost for your upgrade from monthly to annual billing: Click “Confirm subscription.” Click “Confirm subscription.” Your new annual Team plan will start immediately and you will be credited for any unused time on your previous monthly plan. Your new annual Team plan will start immediately and you will be credited for any unused time on your previous monthly plan.
